notes: Re-assessment after #719/#775 + the finalizeSummary total_tokens surfacing, RE-ANCHORED to the live recording. The conversations/<conv>.db is captured (curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh) and served in replay (StageReplayStore); applyDBMetrics (parser.go:180) lights SessionMetrics.TotalTokens on each turn_done, and finalizeSummary (cmd/replay/metrics.go:59) surfaces it into the golden summary.total_tokens gated to antigravity. The token half is GENUINELY observable: total_tokens_nonzero (summary.total_tokens>0, observations.go:165) PASSES — the live recording's golden shows total_tokens=16316. NOTE total_tokens is a context-occupancy snapshot (current in-context prompt tokens, grows with the conversation, non-decreasing), NOT the per-turn cum-usage accumulator the scenario describes for claudecode — so the cum-based tokens_nonzero (cum_input+cum_output>0) stays 0 and is NOT asserted, and COST + CACHE-READ are deferred to #716. SESSION MODEL (corrected by the live recording): antigravity DOES create a transient proc-<PID> presession that reconciles to the conv-id session in THIS recipe — events.jsonl shows proc-94573 (presession_created -> state_transition ready 'new session created' -> pid_discovered), then a DISTINCT conv-id session 18ee78b4 (state_transition ready -> working/ready x3); pid_discovered later fires on the conv-id and the proc-row is transcript_removed. So this is the TWO-PHASE presession model (NOT single-birth): every post-birth phase anchors to the REAL conv-id session, never the proc-row (which never goes working). The recording has a pid_discovered on the conv-id (pid_bind asserted) but NO process_exited at all, so NO teardown phase is asserted. Each turn_end anchors to its OWN turn_start so the matcher picks the post-turn ready. Model left provisional: the golden's model_name is the db canonical id (gemini-pro-default), not the <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> display name.

text: Transient proc-<PID> presession born ready on launch (presession_created -> state_transition ready)
Conv-id session reconciles (different session_id), born ready when agy writes transcript.jsonl
PID binds to the conv-id session (pid_discovered on the real session; the proc-row presession is then cleaned up)
Turn 1 user prompt drives ready -> working on the conv-id session
Turn 1 completes back to ready; turn_done reads the store -> summary.total_tokens > 0 after T1
Turn 2 user prompt drives ready -> working on the same session
Turn 2 completes back to ready; TotalTokens (context occupancy) non-decreasing vs T1
Turn 3 user prompt drives ready -> working on the same session
Turn 3 ends in ready; TotalTokens non-decreasing across 3 turns; session never enters waiting across the conversation
